prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were computed for pyridine (11 atoms: N + 5C + 5H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF RKS, tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Density fitting was OFF (exact four-centre integrals). Partial charges were obtained via the Mulliken scheme (PySCF). The N±1 states used doublet multiplicity (cation charge +1, mult 2; anion charge −1, mult 2). All three SCFs (neutral, cation, anion) converged. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true.

Headline result — most electrophilic site: Atom 1 (N), f⁺ = 0.48422572.
Most nucleophilic site: Atom 4 (C, para to N), f⁻ = 0.11826260.

Full per-atom Fukui indices (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, gas phase, Mulliken):

Atom | Symbol | f⁺       | f⁻       | f⁰       | Dual Δf
-----|--------|----------|----------|----------|----------
1    | N      | +0.48423 | +0.06412 | +0.27417 | +0.42010
2    | C      | +0.32447 | +0.00619 | +0.16533 | +0.31828
3    | C      | +0.14032 | +0.11823 | +0.12928 | +0.02209
4    | C      | +0.14040 | +0.11826 | +0.12933 | +0.02213
5    | C      | +0.29963 | +0.11207 | +0.20585 | +0.18756
6    | C      | +0.29948 | +0.11201 | +0.20574 | +0.18747
7    | H      | −0.14151 | +0.08285 | −0.02933 | −0.22436
8    | H      | −0.13368 | +0.09818 | −0.01775 | −0.23186
9    | H      | −0.13366 | +0.09818 | −0.01774 | −0.23184
10   | H      | −0.13982 | +0.09496 | −0.02243 | −0.23478
11   | H      | −0.13985 | +0.09495 | −0.02245 | −0.23479

Charge conservation: sum(f⁺) = 1.0000 ✅, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000 ✅. Warnings array: empty — clean run. No engine warnings reported.
